job_title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Product and Platform
job_nlp_title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Product and Platform
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning Systems, Large Language Model (LLM) Fine-tuning, Prompt Engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Pipelines, Python
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning Systems:1.0, Large Language Model (LLM) Fine-tuning:1.0, Prompt Engineering:1.0, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Pipelines:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years building and shipping ML systems in production, with at least 6–12 months hands-on with LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or RAG pipelines, Fluency in Python for AI development and comfort working in Jupyter/IPython, Solid understanding of modern ML tooling (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX) and containerized/cloud deployment basics, Clear, approachable communication with both technical peers and non-technical partners, Bias toward action, curiosity, and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving startup environment
preferred_quals: Prior experience in coaching, learning-science, ed-tech, or behavior-change domains, Exposure to RLHF, preference tuning, or multimodal models
core_responsibilities: Prototype, fine-tune, and evaluate LLM-powered features—from conversational insights to practice-moment nudges—using Python and Jupyter notebooks, Own the production lifecycle: data prep, experiment design, offline/online evaluation, and weekly pushes to prod alongside a tight squad of ML/Backend/Full Stack Engineers, Collaborate daily with Product, Coaching Science, and Learning Design to turn behavior-change research into delightful user moments, Contribute to technical design by shaping model architectures, retrieval strategies, and safety guards—while staying hands-on in code, Measure what matters: define success metrics, implement A/B tests, and iterate quickly on real coach feedback, Ship end-to-end improvements to products like FocusFrame, our AI copilot that helps coaches deliver higher-impact sessions in real time
job_summary: BetterUp is a company focused on human transformation through world-class coaching and Generative AI. They are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to prototype and evaluate LLM-powered features, manage the production lifecycle, and collaborate with various teams to enhance user experiences.
